creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update of graphics/vigra from 1.9.0 to 1.10.0 with new features and bugfixes, please see http://ukoethe.github.io/vigra/doc-release/vigra/CreditsChangelog.html

The ports changes are
- new version 1.10.0
- MASTERSITE changed to github
- Numpy option: make gcc usage functional again for 10.0+
- option descriptions changed from gcc46 to gcc47
- updates and fixes on plist


As far as I understand, ports/167613 is obsolete and can be closed.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
